description: Starter cold-boot fallback for Vagrant Story (USA) when no near-battle savestate is available. Tune the frame waits after the first real run; this scaffold is intentionally conservative and assumes memcard-backed menu resume.

steps.note: Dismiss the title or intro gate after fastboot settles.
Advance from the title screen into the main menu.
Move the highlight toward Continue or Load if the default cursor is elsewhere.
Confirm the selected save or submenu entry.
Clear the next prompt and give the game time to finish loading.
